name: checkout-kiosk
description: Electron hardware bridge for OWW kiosk + admin (NFC, future printer). Same codebase produces two named binaries via build-time mode injection.

scripts._compile: npm run inject-mode && npm run tsc:main && npm run tsc:renderer
scripts.build:kiosk: cross-env BRIDGE_MODE=kiosk npm run _compile && electron-builder --config electron-builder.kiosk.yml
scripts.build:admin: cross-env BRIDGE_MODE=admin npm run _compile && electron-builder --config electron-builder.admin.yml
scripts.typecheck: cross-env BRIDGE_MODE=kiosk npm run inject-mode && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p src/renderer/tsconfig.json
